questionHtml: Suggest why water was chosen to extract ascorbic acid from the spinach leaves with reference to its structure.
markschemeHtml:
«ascorbic acid» has multiple −OH/hydroxyl groups ✔

can H-bond with water ✔

 

Do not accept OH−/hydroxide for M1

meta.title: Suggest why water was chosen to extract ascorbic acid from the spinach leaves with reference to its structure.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.2.8—The nature of the force that exists between molecules is determined by the size and polarity of the molecules. Intermolecular forces include London (dispersion), dipole-induced dipole, dipole–dipole and hydrogen bonding. Deduce the types of intermolecular force present from the structural features of covalent molecules.
Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
